signals.description: Closed $45M Series C led by Insight Partners to scale global infrastructure.
signals.signal_text: congratulations on the recent Series C funding round led by Insight Partners

signals.description: Opened 12 new roles for Senior Backend Engineers with Kubernetes and Go expertise.
signals.signal_text: I noticed CloudKnot is aggressively hiring for several Senior Backend and Kubernetes roles

signals.description: Launched a new distributed tracing feature for their core analytics engine.
signals.signal_text: saw the launch of your new distributed tracing capabilities last week

signals.description: Raised $30M Series B to expand zero-trust architecture for microservices.
signals.signal_text: impressive work securing the $30M Series B to double down on zero-trust

signals.description: Appointed Sarah Jenkins as the new VP of Engineering to oversee cloud migration.
signals.signal_text: congrats on bringing Sarah Jenkins on board as your new VP of Engineering

signals.description: Migrated entire monolithic checkout system to a service-mesh architecture.
signals.signal_text: was reading about PixelLogic's successful migration to a service-mesh architecture

signals.description: Announced $60M Series D to expand into the European market.
signals.signal_text: the recent $60M Series D announcement and your upcoming expansion into Europe

signals.description: Hiring a Head of DevOps to lead their transition to a multi-cloud environment.
signals.signal_text: saw you are looking for a Head of DevOps to spearhead the multi-cloud transition

signals.description: Released public API for their real-time logistics tracking platform.
signals.signal_text: congrats on the public release of the StreamLine API

signals.description: Raised $25M Series B to scale HIPAA-compliant microservices infrastructure.
signals.signal_text: your $25M Series B to build out more HIPAA-compliant microservices

signals.description: Scaling the SRE team by 40% over the next two quarters.
signals.signal_text: I noticed OmniSync is planning to grow the SRE team by 40% soon

signals.description: Integrated OpenTelemetry across all production environments.
signals.signal_text: great to see KubeScale adopting OpenTelemetry across all environments

signals.description: Closed $80M Series C to build proprietary LLM infrastructure.
signals.signal_text: the massive $80M Series C round to accelerate your LLM infrastructure

signals.description: Hiring for Platform Engineering roles focused on developer experience (DevEx).
signals.signal_text: your focus on hiring Platform Engineers to improve internal DevEx

signals.description: Open-sourced their internal Kubernetes operator for database management.
signals.signal_text: congrats on open-sourcing your Kubernetes operator for DBs

signals.description: Secured $35M in Series B funding for autonomous supply chain software.
signals.signal_text: congratulations on the $35M Series B for the autonomous supply chain platform

signals.description: Adding 20+ Software Engineers to their distributed systems group in Berlin.
signals.signal_text: saw you are scaling the distributed systems team in Berlin with 20+ new roles

signals.description: Migrated from AWS Lambda to EKS to handle increased traffic loads.
signals.signal_text: your recent transition from Lambda to EKS to support higher traffic

signals.description: Raised $55M Series C led by Sequoia Capital.
signals.signal_text: the exciting news about your $55M Series C led by Sequoia

signals.description: Hiring a Director of Cloud Infrastructure to manage multi-region deployments.
signals.signal_text: saw the opening for a Director of Cloud Infrastructure to lead multi-region strategy
